content_body: My family and I just enjoyed a wonderful family vacation over the 4th of July at this gorgeous cabin on the Toccoa River! The staff (Taylor!!) was super quick to respond to all of our questions and helped us find the perfect cabin for our family. We had requests, too! I wanted a hot tub, my boys wanted to fish and we all wanted river views! Oh! And we wanted our small family dog to join us! We all got our wishes! The cabin was very well stocked and we loved watching the train go by below us. We will rent again!
title: Met All Our Needs!
